title: Working Like a Lawyer with Claude
summary: Mark Pike and Anna Gressel discuss how lawyers use Claude for legal work, examining changes in legal practice driven by AI. They emphasize that judgment calls remain with human lawyers despite AI augmentation.
writeup: Mark Pike and Anna Gressel discuss how lawyers apply Claude to legal work and how AI is shifting day-to-day legal practice. The conversation covers prompt engineering and a human-in-the-loop approach to professional AI use. The central point is that AI augments legal work while judgment calls stay with human lawyers.
